title: generates corrupted cpp code with scoping failure

features.name: fork_join_none with automatic variable from outer scope
features.description: Code should include a fork/join_none block containing an automatic variable initialized from an outer scope loop variable

features.name: delay statement using automatic variable
features.description: Code should include a delay statement (#) using an automatic variable as the delay value

features.name: nested begin_end block inside fork with automatic variable
features.description: Code should include a nested begin/end block inside fork/join_none containing an automatic variable from outer scope
features.snippet:
fork
  begin
    automatic int m = j;
  end
join_none

features.name: loop variable used across fork boundary
features.description: Code should include a for loop whose loop variable is referenced inside a fork/join_none block
